name: Polaris Geothermal Inc.
description: Polaris Renewable Energy Inc., formerly known as Polaris Geothermal Inc., is a Canadian publicly traded company focused on the acquisition, development, and operation of renewable energy projects across Latin America and the Caribbean. The company manages a diverse portfolio of power plants, including geothermal, hydroelectric, and solar photovoltaic facilities. Headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, Polaris is committed to contributing to the global energy transition by providing sustainable power solutions while maintaining high standards of corporate governance, ethical practices, and responsible business operations for the benefit of future generations.
